36.reason: When the '-' does not satisfy any expansion condition, the dash itself should be output. Missing an else clause here causes the dash to be silently omitted.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  When the '-' does not satisfy any expansion condition, the dash itself should be output. Missing an else clause here causes the dash to be silently omitted.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  When s[i] is '-' but the expansion conditions are not met, the code does not copy '-' to z, causing it to be omitted from the output. An else clause should be added here to copy s[i] to z.

13.reason: When s[i] is '-' but the expansion conditions are not met, the '-' character is skipped and not copied to z. An else branch is needed to copy s[i] when expansion fails.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  When s[i] is '-' but the expansion conditions are not met, the '-' character is skipped and not copied to z. An else branch is needed to copy s[i] when expansion fails.
